title: pimpinella huillensis
intro: Pimpinella huillensis, also known as Huillensis, is a plant species in the carrot family (Apiaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it beneficial in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Pimpinella huillensis include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or extract, and is often used in traditional medicine in various parts of the world.
